title: selago peduncularis
intro: Selago peduncularis, also known as the Blue Mountain-sage or Mountain-sage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pediculariaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selago peduncularis include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of allergies. Herbal preparations of Selago peduncularis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
